creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
The host and the jail are running ed6a9452be01c1b7805d0a7311211b8cf381a9dd. Mine is about two weeks newer than yours.

Memory is not an issue. The failure also occurs when only building devel/py-Jinja2 under poudriere bulk -J1. Also, MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE didn't resolve it either.
